functions.title: Guide Book #71
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #71§r
§lRat Curserer§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Curserer, Summoner, Spellcaster, Magical, Hybrid, Humanoid, Monster, Boss.
•§lSpawns in§r: Rats Dungeon

•§lHealth§r: 300
•§lKnockback resistance§r: 0.5
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Stone Rat Curserer Trophy, Curserer Staff, Cursed Eye, Book of Curses, Leather Scrap, XP Orbs.

•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Traders, Villagers, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lEquipped weapon§r: Curserer Staff
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 9-10
•§lRange attack§r: Curse Magic Missile

•§lProjectile damage:§r 6
•Can summon 3-8 §lCursed Rat§r around its self.
•Can transform a §lWild Rat§r into a §LCursed Rat§r.
•Can broadcast its enemies to all nearby Cursed Rats.
•Can add a Regeneration effect to itself with a 1:00
duration in every 1:05 minutes when its health reaches less than 25%.§’

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Rat Curserer is a sinister and formidable mid-tier boss that commands cursed magic deep within the Rats Dungeon. Blending humanoid intelligence with rat-like agility, this cursed spellcaster wields a Curserer Staff to unleash

§‘devastating Curse Magic Missiles and commands swarms of Cursed Rats, which it can summon or corrupt from ordinary wild rats.
 
With a hefty 200 HP, ranged and melee capabilities, and a self-healing Regeneration effect when weakened, it's designed to

§’wear down unprepared players through attrition and overwhelming numbers. Its ability to broadcast enemy targets to its minions makes it especially dangerous in groups. Defeating it rewards rare magical items like the Book of Curses and the ominous
Cursed Eye—ideal for progressing through curse-themed mechanics or unlocking advanced magic systems.§’
